default: minimal single-color line illustration, consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps
fluid wave forms, Sunshine/Gold and Sky Blue/Deep Blue colorways, long & short variants
quick transitions, no autoplay >~5s without static fallback
italic or distinguished styling, attributed '- [Name], LISRAYA patient'
italic reserved for study names, notes, citations
large and bold % figure is hero, supporting copy lighter weight beneath
